english_news.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
english_news.summary: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

english_news.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
english_news.summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.

english_news.title: SpaceX stock climbs 2% after falling below $150 debut price
english_news.summary: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.

english_news.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
english_news.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.

english_news.title: Sen. Cassidy plans to push 'big idea' for Social Security reform in last days in office
english_news.summary: As Social Security faces an imminent funding shortfall, Sen. Bill Cassidy said he has come up with a plan to invest in the stock market on the program's behalf.

english_news.title: Progressive Brad Lander’s surging bid for Congress splinters Democrats' labor union alliance
english_news.summary: Rep. Dan Goldman, D-N.Y., is fighting for his political life in a race with Brad Lander, who is backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani and Sen. Bernie Sanders, I-Vt.

english_news.title: 'I like their money': Trump threatens lawsuits against ABC for reporting on Reflecting Pool
english_news.summary: The latest action against ABC comes as the broadcaster faces two investigations from the Federal Communications Commission.

english_news.title: Trump administration to loan $17 billion to speed deployment of 10 big nuclear reactors in U.S.
english_news.summary: The loans will support the construction of five projects that each host two big nuclear reactors.

english_news.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
english_news.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

english_news.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
english_news.summary: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

english_news.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
english_news.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

english_news.title: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
english_news.summary: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".

english_news.title: Zambia ex-president's family wins latest legal battle over what should happen to his body
english_news.summary: Edgar Lungu's family and the Zambian government remain in dispute 12 months after he died.

english_news.title: Spider which uses spring trap to capture prey discovered in Australia
english_news.summary: Researchers say their hunting method - which allows them to prey on dangerous ants - is unprecedented.

english_news.title: Irish government to contribute £197m to cross-border rail services
english_news.summary: The money will come from the last allocation from the Irish government's Shared Island Fund.

english_news.title: Trump anticipates better relationship with Colombia under new leader
english_news.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella, who preliminary results suggest is Colombia's next president, had Trump's endorsement.

chinese_news.title: 圆桌论坛：比共识更早一步 AI 创投的真实棋局 | 2026WAVES
chinese_news.summary:
AI不是一阵风，它正在变成地平线。而地平线的意思是——你看不到它的尽头，但它一直在那里。

当下AI热潮涌动，行业共识尚未形成，但真正的机遇往往诞生在共识之前。接下来就让我们进入比共识更早一步 AI 创投的真实棋局圆桌论坛 !

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

巴芮｜暗涌副主编（主持人）

朱天宇｜蓝驰创投 管理合伙人

秦深涛｜OriginFlow创始人&CEO

 

巴芮：大家好！我们这场对谈的主题

chinese_news.title: 只租办公室的拼多多，在雄安买了一栋楼
chinese_news.summary:
扎堆雄安的互联网大厂又多了一个。

6月21日，拼多多集团与中国电建完成正式签约，通过整体购置方式持有雄安·电建智汇城数字新消费电商产业园的办公楼。

这是拼多多第一次“买楼”。

雄安新区产业园

拼多多自2015年9月正式成立上线以来，尽管已经发展到了约2.55万员工，超4300亿营收，但它始终采取轻资产办公模式，坚持不买楼、不盖楼。目前拼多多所在的办公地，包括金虹桥国际中心、艺丰中心、晶耀虹桥、星展银行大厦等

chinese_news.title: 以“高导热+高强韧”镁合金切入机器人等高端制造领域，「宜镁华」完成数千万元天使轮融资｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，「宜镁华」近期宣布完成数千万元天使轮融资。本轮融资由星河创投与华中实业集团投资。资金将用于产能建设、研发投入和团队扩充等。

宜镁华专注于镁合金材料研发，零部件开发设计与零部件产品制造，背靠上海交通大学轻合金精密成型国家工程研究中心，自研高导高强合金设计技术、超高导热复材设计及界面调控技术与半固态注塑成型工艺，切入机器人关节电机模组、外骨骼、汽车结构件等高附加值场景，目前已与包含头部机器人本体厂商在内的超10家机器人本体、零部件厂商开展合作，确定镁合金替代产品超15种，并且获得多个汽车领域客户定点。

公司创始人兼CEO程轩挺是上海交通大学材料工程硕士、复旦大学MBA，拥有20余年汽车行业产业化经验，曾主导技术产业化项目实现年营收超16亿元，后创立苏州和健汽车科技成功开发吉利、智己等头部客户。

以配方和工艺创新，突破镁合金性能局限

“新能源汽车变得越来越重，加上各种智能硬件，每辆车上市时实际重量都远超最初设定，所以轻量化成了车企必

chinese_news.title: WAVES 2026：盛夏的这场讨论，留下了创投圈值得反复回看的观点
chinese_news.summary: WAVES 2026汇聚众多投资人、产业领袖与创业者，围绕AI与产业未来展开深度对话。嘉宾核心观点现集中呈现。

chinese_news.title: 回到没有AI的那一天，寻找第一性原理 | WAVES2026
chinese_news.summary:
我们不妨想一下，如果有一天，AI突然消失了，我们会失去什么？这个问题不是为了制造恐慌，而是为了让我们想清楚：我们今天投AI，到底是在投它的能力，还是投它背后的人性需求？接下来这个环节当中，回到没有AI的那一天，去找第一性原理。上一场李丰的演讲给了我们一个思考的起点，现在，我们要把它变成一场辩论。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

图源：Waves现场

海若镜｜暗涌副主编（主持人）

王鹤宇｜CMC AI创意基金

张毅｜

chinese_news.title: 主题圆桌：从无声到轰鸣，令人期待的消费硬件 | WAVES2026
chinese_news.summary:
消费硬件曾经一度被投资人“冷落”，因为它太慢、太重、太不性感。但现在，一批新的消费硬件正在从无声到轰鸣。它们不靠故事，靠体验。不靠流量，靠复购。相信之后，是产品。这一场，我们来看一看那些被“最早相信的人”投出来的硬件，长成了什么样子。

大公司：

甲骨文上财年裁员约2.1万

甲骨文上财年裁员约2.1万，减员规模大于此前已知水平，其中包括因使用人工智能（AI）而被取消的岗位。甲骨文周一在年度财务监管申报文件中称：“我们在各项业务中采用和部署AI技术，已经导致并且未来可能继续导致员工人数减少。”

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $62,000 on or before July 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC dropped below $60K amid SpaceX selloff and Fed rate signals; Deutsche Bank and Cointelegraph flag 15% further downside risk, creating asymmetric odds if support holds.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Bitcoin teases $62K breakdown), CoinDesk (Fed/ETF/AI pressures), SpaceX $600B wipeout ripple effect

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates by at least 75 basis points total by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Factory job cuts neared crisis/Covid levels (S&P manufacturing), Fed pivot signals mounting; market currently prices partial easing—extreme labor weakness may force aggressive action.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (June job cuts near financial crisis levels), CoinDesk (Fed pressures on BTC), macro context

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close 2026 trading at or below $2,000?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Ethereum Foundation cutting budget 40%, 20% staff cuts, leadership exodus; narrative shift from growth to contraction in a major L1 foundation.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Vitalik announces 40% budget cut, 20% staff layoffs, leadership exodus)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Meta's new smart glasses product generate >$500M in annualized revenue by June 30, 2027?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Meta launches $299 smart glasses; Zuckerberg pushing wearables as stepping stone to AR lenses—early commercial signal with low bar for investor sentiment test.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Meta announces new smart glasses starting $299, Zuckerberg wearables push)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the U.S. Senate pass a Social Security reform bill involving equity market investment by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Sen. Cassidy planning 'big idea' Social Security stock market reform in final days; imminent funding shortfall + potential lame-duck window creates narrow legislative window.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Cassidy Social Security stock market reform plan)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX's public stock price close above $200 by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or official SpaceX IPO listing closing price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SpaceX fell below $150 debut after record IPO surge; market currently pricing in sharp correction, but tokenized share demand exceeded $1B—institutional FOMO may drive recovery if nuclear loan ($17B) accelerates deployment narrative.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX $600B market cap wipeout (Cointelegraph), but underlying demand signals (tokenized shares oversubscribed) suggest contrarian long setup

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Iran's crude oil exports exceed 2.5M barrels per day by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) weekly petroleum status report or Reuters/Bloomberg oil flows data
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: U.S. issued sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue; market has not fully priced in ramping Iranian supply, potential downward pressure on oil prices and petro-currency strength.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC (Iran sanctions rollback, 42+ ships through Strait of Hormuz in single day), though Iran-nuclear inspection commitments remain unclear

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the EU's digital euro pilot launch with live transaction capability by March 31, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: European Central Bank official announcement or ECB press release confirming live pilot phase start
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: EU committee advanced digital euro bill with offline/online capability, privacy safeguards; crypto market underestimates central bank stablecoin regulatory precedent—early launch signals accelerated CBDC timeline globally.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (EU committee advances digital euro bill after key vote)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Chainlink's (LINK) token price exceed $50 by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap daily closing price (USD)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chainlink teams up with 47 South Korean + European banks for cross-border money transfer infrastructure; enterprise adoption signal bullish for oracle/interop thesis but retail sentiment lags institutional deal flow.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Chainlink 47-bank partnership for intl. money transfers), banking infrastructure acceleration in Asia-Europe corridor

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Oracle (ORCL) stock close above $250 by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or official ORCL closing price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Oracle laid off ~21K employees (36Kr/CoinDesk digest); layoff scale rivals NVDA/Meta, yet Oracle's AI pivot (database, cloud infra) less visible in narrative than competitors—potential undervaluation if supply-chain demand (AI data centers) sustains.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr (Oracle ~21K layoffs), but broader AI capex cycle may offset headcount cuts

investment_theses.thesis: Long USD/commodity baskets via DXY on Iran sanctions rollback creating near-term petro-supply shock; rebalance into energy names (XLE) if Strait of Hormuz crude flow exceeds 3M bbl/day by August.
supporting_signals: BBC: 42+ ships transiting Strait of Hormuz in single day post-US-Iran deal
U.S. sanctions waiver unlock billions in Iranian revenue
Normalized Iranian supply pressures oil prices, supports USD strength vs. commodity currencies
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran cannot ramp production quickly due to sanctions-era underinvestment; global demand weakness (manufacturing job cuts) may offset supply gains, keeping oil range-bound.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (Dollar Index ETF), or pair trade: Long XLE (Energy ETF) / Short crude oil futures if flow data confirms ramp

investment_theses.thesis: Short BTC/long volatility (buy BTC put spreads or short perps) until Fed signals explicit rate cut path; $60K support tested by AI capex rotation and margin flush, expect 15% downside to $51K before summer low.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Deutsche Bank flags Fed, ETF, AI pressures on BTC; 15% plunge indicator triggered
Cointelegraph: SpaceX $600B wipeout (tech equity selloff), BTC support at $60K threatened
CNBC: Factory job cuts neared crisis levels, but Fed rate guidance remains hawkish (no imminent cuts priced)
investment_theses.counter_view: BTC historically bottoms ahead of Fed cuts by 6-8 weeks; if inflation data rolls over, market reprices cuts faster than fed funds futures, causing short squeeze above $65K.
investment_theses.expression: Short BTC perps (1-2x leverage) on Bybit/Dydx, or buy OTM BTC put spreads (Jun/Jul expiry, 55K/50K strikes) if IV still compressed

investment_theses.thesis: Long ETH/BTC ratio on Foundation budget cuts + leadership exodus signaling protocol-level risk re-pricing; Ethereum increasingly viewed as legacy L1, ratio compressed vs. risk-adjusted fundamentals.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Ethereum Foundation 40% budget cut, 20% staff layoffs, leadership exodus announced
Narrative shift from Ethereum growth story to contraction/consolidation
BTC dominance rising on macro (Fed uncertainty), structural ETH headwinds
investment_theses.counter_view: Foundation cuts may be prudent fiscal discipline; core protocol (Dencun, EOF upgrades) proceeds without foundation funding—developer exodus may be temporary, ratio recovers if rollups (Arbitrum, Optimism) momentum continues.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via spot (sell BTC, buy ETH equal notional) or use perpetual ratio futures if available; alternatively, long ETH short vol (if IV curve inverted)

investment_theses.thesis: Long consumption hardware names (AR/VR, smart glasses TAM) on Meta $299 smart glasses launch; near-term margin pressure but 2027 revenue upside priced too low; Meta premium to Snap justified by wearables narrative.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Meta announces $299 smart glasses, Zuckerberg pushing wearables as AR pathway
36Kr: Chinese VC forum indicates AI hardware (consumption + robotics) entering consensus phase post-hype
Hacker News: Steam Machine launch, consumer hardware discussion spiking (1800+ score)
investment_theses.counter_view: Smart glasses adoption curve historically slower than expected (Glass, Hololens); battery life, app ecosystem, killer use case still unclear—$299 price point may canibalize iPad/tablet, not generate incremental revenue.
investment_theses.expression: Long META stock (or META calls, 3-6 month expiry, 10-15% OTM), or long specific hardware suppliers (e.g., MU for NAND supply to Meta manufacturing if they ramp)

investment_theses.thesis: Long nuclear infrastructure via TMF/IVN on $17B U.S. government loan for 10 reactors; de-risking capex for utilities, accelerates deployment timeline, supports uranium/nuclear narrative through 2026-27.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump administration loans $17B to speed 10 big nuclear reactors (5 projects × 2 reactors each)
Narrative: AI data centers driving power demand, nuclear as clean/baseload solution
Policy: Bipartisan nuclear support (loan extends across administrations)
investment_theses.counter_view: Nuclear construction timelines have historically slipped; permitting, labor shortages, supply-chain constraints may delay deployment beyond 2026-27; loan capital may not fully deploy for 2-3 years.
investment_theses.expression: Long uranium ETF (URA, URG) or buy call options on nuclear-exposed utilities (NEE, DUK 6-month calls); alternatively, long infrastructure/renewable energy ETF (ICLN) weighted toward nuclear component
